The '''Battle of [[Dellalt/Legends|Dellalt]]''' was one of the last battles of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|Outer Rim Sieges]]. After [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], a number of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] managed to escape here, but were pursued by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces. Six of the surviving Jedi stole an [[SX troop transport|SX troop shuttle]], disguising it as the ''[[Vagabond Trader]]''. They were eventually rescued by the ''[[Drunk Dancer]]''.

{{Battle-stub}}
